title: Weak Agent Parent Lane Review
goal: Resolve #403 by validating that the named child issues #404, #405, #406, #407, and #408 satisfy the parent lane outcome.
non_goals: Do not add new implementation beyond the parent-lane closeout review.
Do not reopen broad product-compression work.
Do not treat a parent issue as closed unless every named child outcome has checked-in proof.

intent.outcome: Close or replan the weak-agent parent lane based on child evidence.
intent.constraints: Use live GitHub child state, external intent evidence, archived child execplans, summary, reconcile, and proof output.
intent.latitude: Close #403 if the parent acceptance is fully covered by child evidence; otherwise promote one concrete follow-on.
intent.escalation: Escalate if a child issue is open, missing checked-in proof, or parent acceptance has an unsliced unmet expectation.

execution.next_step: Compare parent acceptance against child closeout evidence.
execution.proof: Run summary, reconcile, issue-state checks, and planning doctor.

invariants: Parent closure must distinguish child completion from broader future work.
Open follow-on work must remain routed in state or GitHub.
No implementation files should change for a pure parent-lane closeout.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Improve weak-agent recovery and strong-agent leverage for the package state represented by #403.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Closed the weak-agent parent lane from checked-in child closeout evidence instead of relying on chat memory.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: Future weak-agent or strong-agent improvements may be new issues, but not required for #403's named acceptance.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: The package correctly kept #403 visible as an ambiguous parent continuation until the child evidence was reviewed.

intent_interpretation.literal request: Ingest and implement all issues lane by lane. Commit and push after each milestone. Collect dogfooding evidence.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Close the weak-agent recovery lane only after all named child issues are landed and audited.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Review #403 parent acceptance against child closeout evidence and close or replan.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Confirm #404-#408 are closed, have checked-in closeout evidence, and map to each #403 intended outcome bullet.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: planning state, external intent evidence, and this parent-lane execplan
execution_bounds.required validation commands: gh issue view for #403-#408, agentic-workspace summary, reconcile, doctor
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Any code or contract change beyond parent closeout evidence.

context_budget.live working set: issue #403, child issues #404-#408, archived child plans, external evidence, state.toml
context_budget.recoverable later: GitHub issue bodies and archived child closeout plans
context_budget.externalize before shift: Archive this parent-lane plan and update external evidence.
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: gh issue view 403 --json number,title,body,state,labels,url; gh issue view 404-408
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Parent #403 review: verify closed child issues cover acceptance, then close or replan.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: A child is open, lacks proof, or parent acceptance has unsliced work.

references.label: Improve weak-agent recovery and strong-agent leverage from current package state

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Close or replan the #403 parent lane based on child evidence.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: No implementation changes; do not close the parent if any named child acceptance is unmet.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Whether the parent can close from child evidence or needs a promoted follow-on.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: Child evidence is missing, child state is open, or parent acceptance has unsliced requirements.

active_milestone.scope: Parent-lane closeout review and evidence update.

invariants: Parent closure must distinguish child completion from broader future work.
Open follow-on work must remain routed in state or GitHub.
No implementation files should change for a pure parent-lane closeout.
validation_commands: gh issue view 404 --json number,state,title,url; gh issue view 405 --json number,state,title,url; gh issue view 406 --json number,state,title,url; gh issue view 407 --json number,state,title,url; gh issue view 408 --json number,state,title,url
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: #403 intended outcome bullets are mapped to closed child issues.
Every named child issue is closed and has checked-in closeout evidence.
Any remaining parent-level intent is either explicitly absent or promoted to a concrete follow-on.
External intent evidence and roadmap no longer keep a closed lane open.

execution_run.handoff source: uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json --profile full; gh issue view 403 --json number,title,body,state,labels,url,comments
execution_run.what happened: Reviewed #403 parent acceptance against live child issue state and archived child closeout evidence. #404 covers off-happy-path weak-agent recovery, #405 covers lifecycle mutation safety, #406 covers validation-vs-intent closeout, #407 covers anti-overfitting review, and #408 covers generated non-Python maturity labels.
execution_run.validations run: gh issue view 403 --json number,title,body,state,labels,url,comments; gh issue view 404 --json number,state,title,url; gh issue view 405 --json number,state,title,url; gh issue view 406 --json number,state,title,url; gh issue view 407 --json number,state,title,url; gh issue view 408 --json number,state,title,url; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/weak-agent-parent-lane-review.plan.json --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
execution_run.result for continuation: #403 acceptance satisfied; next lane is architecture-boundary #409/#410/#411.
execution_run.next step: Archive this plan, update external evidence, close #403, commit, push, then promote architecture-boundary work.

finished_run_review.config compliance: package workflow dogfooded through summary, proof, and doctor

proof_report.validation proof: Live GitHub state shows #404, #405, #406, #407, and #408 are closed; package summary exposes this as an active parent-lane plan; proof selects planning_surfaces; planning doctor is healthy.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: gh issue view 403-408; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/weak-agent-parent-lane-review.plan.json --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Ingest and implement all issues lane by lane. Commit and push after each milestone. Collect dogfooding evidence.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: #403 intended outcome names five actionable gaps; each maps to a closed child issue with checked-in closeout evidence: #404, #405, #406, #407, and #408.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Preserve the larger outcome separately from bounded child slices until closeout evidence proves the parent lane is done.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Prefer parent-lane evidence update over implementation if child evidence already satisfies the lane.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Do child closeouts satisfy every named #403 outcome bullet?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #403 is a parent over #404-#408, and all named child gaps are closed with checked-in closeout evidence.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: .agentic-workspace/planning/external-intent-evidence.json entries for #404-#408; archived child execplans for #404-#408
closure_check.reopen trigger: A named child issue reopens or a concrete unmet #403 acceptance bullet is identified.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: #403 parent-lane acceptance validated against child closeout evidence.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Archive this parent-lane plan and update provider-agnostic external evidence.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): No new docs/config needed; state and external evidence carry the lane transition.

discard.summary: Command-by-command execution detail stays in the archived proof record.

config_check.summary: No new docs/config needed; state and external evidence carry the lane transition.

docs.summary: No new docs/config needed; state and external evidence carry the lane transition.

issue_follow_up.summary: Improve weak-agent recovery and strong-agent leverage from current package state
